no-hardcoded-env-urls.description: Environment URLs should not be hard-coded. Use parameters or variables.

no-unused-params.description: Parameters should be used in the template.

no-unused-vars.description: Variables should be used in the template.

prefer-interpolation.description: Use string interpolation instead of concat function.

secure-parameter-default.description: Secure parameters should not have default values.

protect-commandtoexecute-secrets.description: Secrets should not be exposed in commandToExecute properties.

use-stable-vm-image.description: Use stable VM image versions instead of 'latest'.

explicit-values-for-loc-params.description: Location parameters should have explicit values (disabled for multi-region support).

no-loc-expr-outside-params.description: Location expressions should only be used in parameters.

outputs-should-not-contain-secrets.description: Outputs should not contain secure values.

use-resource-id-functions.description: Use resource ID functions instead of string concatenation.

admin-username-should-not-be-literal.description: Admin username should not be a literal value - use parameters.

no-hardcoded-location.description: Location should not be hard-coded - use parameters or resourceGroup().location.

use-recent-api-versions.description: Use recent API versions for resources (within last 2 years).

decompiler-cleanup.description: Cleanup recommended after decompiling ARM templates.

prefer-unquoted-property-names.description: Prefer unquoted property names (disabled for consistency).
